title: Customers With Orders Every Month
description: Find customers who have placed orders in every distinct month present in the dataset.
sql_solution: SELECT customer_id FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT substr(date,1,7)) = (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT substr(date,1,7)) FROM orders);
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

monthly_orders = orders.withColumn("month", date_format(to_date(col("date")), "yyyy-MM"))
required_months = monthly_orders.agg(countDistinct("month").alias("required_months"))

result = (
    monthly_orders.groupBy("customer_id")
    .agg(countDistinct("month").alias("month_count"))
    .crossJoin(required_months)
    .filter(col("month_count") == col("required_months"))
    .select("customer_id")
)
